archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) modified for Data-Dense SaaS
domain: Insurance / Finance / B2B SaaS Dashboard (Italian Language)
rationale: Insurance requires a UI that communicates authority, precision, and trust. We avoid 'tech-bro' neon and dark themes in favor of a crisp, stark light theme with high-contrast structural greys and a strong signal accent (Authoritative Sky Blue). This maximizes readability for dense data tables, forms, and charts.

typography.rationale: IBM Plex Sans has exceptional numerals and tabular figures, making it perfect for accounting, policy numbers, and dates. Work Sans provides a slightly humanist but professional touch for headings.

spacing_and_layout.dashboard_grid: Mode B: 'Control Room Grid' - grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 or gap-6
spacing_and_layout.table_density: Dense SaaS layout. Use compact rows with py-2 px-4 to fit maximum data. Implement progressive disclosure (expandable rows or side-drawers for details).
spacing_and_layout.shadows: shadow-sm for cards. 1px subtle borders (border-slate-200) are MANDATORY. Do not rely entirely on shadows to separate elements.

component_instructions.general: Use shadcn/ui components extensively. Customize to have 1px borders and slight rounded corners.
component_instructions.tables: Crucial for Anagrafiche, Polizze, Titoli, Sinistri. Use sticky headers, sortable columns, pagination, and clear status tags. Right-align all currency and numerical columns.
component_instructions.forms: Multi-column bento layouts for 'Intervista al cliente' (Data Collection). Left-aligned labels, distinct focus rings (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-sky-500).
component_instructions.charts: Use Recharts or Shadcn Charts for statistics. Ensure high-contrast palettes (Sky 700, Emerald 500, Amber 500).
component_instructions.cards: Flat surface backgrounds. Hover state: slight lift (-translate-y-1) and shadow-md.
component_instructions.sidebar: Dark sidebar (bg-slate-900) to frame the bright data area. Group links logically (Anagrafiche, Assicurazione, Contabilità, Strumenti).

animations.modals_and_drawers: Slide in smoothly, use backdrop-blur-sm on the overlay.

icons_library: @phosphor-icons/react (Use regular or duotone for a premium enterprise feel)

accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='polizza-submit-button', data-testid='nav-clienti').
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure APCA standards. Text on primary buttons must be white or #F8FAFC.

login_backgrounds.description: Milan skyline. Apply a heavy dark blue/slate overlay (e.g. bg-slate-900/80) to ensure login form readability.
Abstract geometric pattern for empty states.

avatars.description: Male avatar for dummy data / current user.
Female avatar for dummy data / clients.

specific_pages_guidance.dashboard_home: Display high-level metrics (Premi Incassati, Sinistri Aperti, Polizze in Scadenza) in a 4-col bento grid. Include a 'Pipeline Email' quick view and 'Activity Log' feed.
specific_pages_guidance.anagrafiche_clienti: Dense table layout. Detail view must include 'Albero Genealogico' (can be visualized as a hierarchical tree or nested cards) and the 'Intervista' form.
specific_pages_guidance.polizze_titoli_sinistri: Tabbed interface or dedicated pages. Use prominent status badges (e.g., Attiva: Green, Sospesa: Amber, Scaduta: Red).
specific_pages_guidance.contabilita: Ledger style tables for Prima nota and Estratti conto. Strict alignment of numerical columns to the right. Alternating row colors (bg-slate-50) for readability.
specific_pages_guidance.import_csv: Dedicated drag-and-drop zone. Progress bar for ANIA 16-record types daily processing.
specific_pages_guidance.calcolo_pensioni_inps: Wizard-style form for data entry (estratti conto contributivo), followed by a large-typography result screen calculating invalidity/disability/survivor pensions.
